requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — Household Refrigerating Appliances (SLS/CISPR 14 series, SLSI)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用制冷器具（SLS/CISPR 14系列，SLSI）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用製冷器具（SLS/CISPR 14系列，SLSI）

summary.en: Electromagnetic disturbance from household refrigerating appliances in Sri Lanka is addressed through the SLSI standards framework adopting the IEC/CISPR 14 series — CISPR 14-1 （emission requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus） and CISPR 14-2 （immunity）. Sri Lanka does not operate a standalone EU-style EMC Directive; EMC performance is treated as part of the SLSI conformity assessment / import inspection for electrical products and through alignment with the underlying IEC/CISPR standards rather than a separate horizontal EMC marking regime. Radio-emitting functions （e.g., Wi-Fi or Bluetooth in a smart refrigerator） fall under the Telecommunications Regulatory Commission of Sri Lanka （TRCSL） type-approval, which is separate from the appliance EMC assessment. Where SLSI requires EMC evidence, a test report against the relevant CISPR 14-1/-2 （or adopted SLS） standard from a recognised laboratory is the typical basis.
summary.zh: 斯里兰卡对家用制冷器具电磁骚扰的管理，通过SLSI标准框架采用IEC/CISPR 14系列实现——CISPR 14-1（家用器具、电动工具及类似器具的发射要求）及CISPR 14-2（抗扰度）。斯里兰卡未设立独立的类欧盟EMC指令；电磁兼容性能作为SLSI对电气产品合格评定/进口检验的一部分处理，并通过与底层IEC/CISPR标准对齐实现，而非另设横向EMC标识制度。具备无线发射功能（如智能冰箱的Wi-Fi或蓝牙）须接受斯里兰卡电信监管委员会（TRCSL）的型号核准，该核准独立于器具的EMC评定。当SLSI要求EMC证据时，通常以认可实验室依据相关CISPR 14-1/-2（或采用的SLS）标准出具的检测报告为依据。
summary.zht: 斯里蘭卡對家用製冷器具電磁騷擾的管理，通過SLSI標準框架採用IEC/CISPR 14系列實現——CISPR 14-1（家用器具、電動工具及類似器具的發射要求）及CISPR 14-2（抗擾度）。斯里蘭卡未設立獨立的類歐盟EMC指令；電磁相容性能作為SLSI對電氣產品合格評定/進口檢驗的一部分處理，並通過與底層IEC/CISPR標準對齊實現，而非另設橫向EMC標識制度。具備無線發射功能（如智慧冰箱的Wi-Fi或藍牙）須接受斯里蘭卡電信監管委員會（TRCSL）的型號核准，該核准獨立於器具的EMC評定。當SLSI要求EMC證據時，通常以認可實驗室依據相關CISPR 14-1/-2（或採用的SLS）標準出具的檢測報告為依據。

standards_or_laws: IEC/CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (as adopted by SLSI)
IEC/CISPR 14-2 — Part 2: Immunity (as adopted by SLSI)
TRCSL type-approval — required separately only if the appliance contains radio/wireless functions (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth)

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances （including refrigerators） are governed by GB 4343.1-2018 （emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016） and GB/T 4343.2-2020 （immunity; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015）, with GB 17625.1 for harmonic current emissions. These are enforced under the CCC mandatory certification regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. Because GB 4343.1 is itself a CISPR 14-1 adoption, the technical content is closely aligned with what SLSI accepts via the CISPR 14 series; however, the CCC EMC certificate is a China-domestic approval and the test report may need re-issuance or recognition for the SLSI route.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容要求依据GB 4343.1-2018（发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗扰度；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）执行，谐波电流发射适用GB 17625.1。上述标准在SAMR/CNCA管理的CCC强制认证制度下执行。由于GB 4343.1本身即为CISPR 14-1的采用版本，其技术内容与SLSI通过CISPR 14系列所接受的内容高度一致；但CCC的EMC证书为中国国内批准，检测报告可能须为SLSI路径重新签发或获得认可。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容要求依據GB 4343.1-2018（發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗擾度；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）執行，諧波電流發射適用GB 17625.1。上述標準在SAMR/CNCA管理的CCC強制認證制度下執行。由於GB 4343.1本身即為CISPR 14-1的採用版本，其技術內容與SLSI通過CISPR 14系列所接受的內容高度一致；但CCC的EMC證書為中國國內批准，檢測報告可能須為SLSI路徑重新簽發或獲得認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Emission limits and measurement methods (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Immunity — product family standard (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1 — Limits for harmonic current emissions

gap.en: The technical EMC gap is small because both GB 4343.1 and the SLSI-adopted standards trace to the CISPR 14 series. The practical gaps are: (1) Sri Lanka has no standalone EU-style EMC marking regime — EMC is assessed within SLSI product certification / import inspection, so EMC evidence is supplied as part of that file rather than via a separate self-declaration; (2) the Chinese CCC EMC certificate is not automatically recognised; a CISPR 14-1/-2 test report （ideally an IECEE CB or internationally recognised lab report） should be presented to SLSI; (3) inverter （variable-speed） compressor models should confirm their existing emission test configuration covers the CISPR 14-1 edition SLSI references; (4) if the refrigerator includes Wi-Fi/Bluetooth, separate TRCSL type-approval is required and is not covered by the appliance EMC report. Confirm the exact CISPR 14 edition and SLSI evidence requirement with the importer.
gap.zh: 电磁兼容的技术差距较小，因为GB 4343.1与SLSI采用的标准均源自CISPR 14系列。实务差距为：（1）斯里兰卡无独立的类欧盟EMC标识制度——EMC在SLSI产品认证/进口检验中评定，故EMC证据作为该文件的一部分提交，而非通过单独自我声明；（2）中国CCC的EMC证书不被自动认可；宜向SLSI提交CISPR 14-1/-2检测报告（最好为IECEE CB或国际认可实验室报告）；（3）变频（变速）压缩机型号应确认其现有发射测试配置涵盖SLSI所引用的CISPR 14-1版本；（4）若冰箱含Wi-Fi/蓝牙，须另行取得TRCSL型号核准，该项不在器具EMC报告覆盖范围内。请向进口商确认具体CISPR 14版本及SLSI证据要求。
gap.zht: 電磁相容的技術差距較小，因為GB 4343.1與SLSI採用的標準均源自CISPR 14系列。實務差距為：（1）斯里蘭卡無獨立的類歐盟EMC標識制度——EMC在SLSI產品認證/進口檢驗中評定，故EMC證據作為該文件的一部分提交，而非通過單獨自我聲明；（2）中國CCC的EMC證書不被自動認可；宜向SLSI提交CISPR 14-1/-2檢測報告（最好為IECEE CB或國際認可實驗室報告）；（3）變頻（變速）壓縮機型號應確認其現有發射測試配置涵蓋SLSI所引用的CISPR 14-1版本；（4）若冰箱含Wi-Fi/藍牙，須另行取得TRCSL型號核准，該項不在器具EMC報告覆蓋範圍內。請向進口商確認具體CISPR 14版本及SLSI證據要求。

mandatory_status.target: Assessed within SLSI product certification / import inspection (no standalone EU-style EMC Directive); TRCSL type-approval mandatory only for radio/wireless functions
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 mandatory (GB) under CCC; GB/T 4343.2-2020 recommended (GB/T); enforced by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Sri Lanka has no standalone EU-style EMC marking regime; EMC for refrigerators is handled within SLSI product certification / import inspection using the CISPR 14 series. The technical gap from Chinese GB 4343.1 （a CISPR 14-1 adoption） is small, but a recognised CISPR 14-1/-2 test report should be presented to SLSI rather than relying on the CCC certificate. Wireless-enabled models also need separate TRCSL type-approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 斯里兰卡无独立的类欧盟EMC标识制度；冰箱的EMC在SLSI产品认证/进口检验中使用CISPR 14系列处理。与中国GB 4343.1（CISPR 14-1采用版本）的技术差距较小，但宜向SLSI提交认可的CISPR 14-1/-2检测报告，而非依赖CCC证书。具备无线功能的型号还须另行取得TRCSL型号核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 斯里蘭卡無獨立的類歐盟EMC標識制度；冰箱的EMC在SLSI產品認證/進口檢驗中使用CISPR 14系列處理。與中國GB 4343.1（CISPR 14-1採用版本）的技術差距較小，但宜向SLSI提交認可的CISPR 14-1/-2檢測報告，而非依賴CCC證書。具備無線功能的型號還須另行取得TRCSL型號核准。
